description: Kin Analytics builds real-time data pipeline automation for mid-market B2B SaaS companies, enabling non-engineering teams to manage and transform data flows without writing code. Series A backed, expanding US East Coast go-to-market.
funding_info: Series A $12M closed February 2026. Lead investor: Gradient Ventures. Total raised: $14.5M.
layoffs: No layoff events found in last 120 days.
leadership_changes: No leadership changes detected in last 90 days.
recent_news: Series A $12M round announced February 2026. Kin Analytics cited as a top-10 data automation startup by TechCrunch in March 2026. Expanding enterprise sales team in New York.
